title: Ethan Mollick 批评 Intelligence Index v4.1 基准更新
full_text:
Ethan Mollick on X: "This was not a good benchmark before it was updated and it is not a good benchmark now. Having AIs evaluate the work of other AIs on publicly available questions from a different closed benchmark doesn’t tell you very much.
And it is unclear how they establish the human ELO. https://t.co/tmZG8MDkRA" / X
Post
Log in Sign up
Post
Ethan Mollick
@emollick
This was not a good benchmark before it was updated and it is not a good benchmark now. Having AIs evaluate the work of other AIs on publicly available questions from a different closed benchmark doesn’t tell you very much.
And it is unclear how they establish the human ELO.
Artificial Analysis
@ArtificialAnlys
23h
Replying to @ArtificialAnlys GDPval-AA v2 is the highest weighted evaluation in the Intelligence Index v4.1. The upgrade re-baselines ELO to human performance at 1000, introduces a rotating panel of frontier-model judges, and raises the turn limit from 100 to 250 for longer-horizon agent trajectories. Claude Show more
10:21 PM · Jun 16, 2026 14.9K Views

discovery_record.discovery_title: Ethan Mollick 批评 Intelligence Index v4.1 基准更新
discovery_record.discovery_summary: 新版 GDPval-AA v2 成为 Intelligence Index v4.1 权重最高的评估，升级将 ELO 基线重置为人类 1000 分，引入前沿模型法官轮换面板，回合上限从 100 提升至 250。Claude Fable 5（有回退）以 1818 分领先，但当前不可用；Claude Opus 4.8 得 1638 分，GPT-5.5 （xhigh） 得 1531 分。Ethan Mollick 批评：AI 评估 AI 在取自另一闭卷基准的公开问题上表现意义有限，且人类 ELO 设定方式不透明，认为更新前后均非良好基准。

key_excerpts.text: 新版 GDPval-AA v2 成为 Intelligence Index v4.1 权重最高的评估，升级将 ELO 基线重置为人类 1000 分，引入前沿模型法官轮换面板，回合上限从 100 提升至 250。Claude Fable 5（有回退）以 1818 分领先，但当前不可用；Claude Opus 4.8 得 1638 分，GPT-5.5 （xhigh） 得 1531 分。Ethan Mollick 批评：AI 评估 AI 在取自另一闭卷基准的公开问题上表现意义有限，且人类 ELO 设定方式不透明，认为更新前后均非良好基准。
Ethan Mollick on X: "This was not a good benchmark before it was updated and it is not a good benchmark now.
Having AIs evaluate the work of other AIs on publicly available questions from a different closed benchmark doesn’t tell you very much.
And it is unclear how they establish the human ELO.
co/tmZG8MDkRA" / X Post Log in Sign up Post Ethan Mollick @emollick This was not a good benchmark before it was updated and it is not a good benchmark now.

company_actions: 新版 GDPval-AA v2 成为 Intelligence Index v4.1 权重最高的评估，升级将 ELO 基线重置为人类 1000 分，引入前沿模型法官轮换面板，回合上限从 100 提升至 250。Claude Fable 5（有回退）以 1818 分领先，但当前不可用；Claude Opus 4.8 得 1638 分，GPT-5.5 （xhigh） 得 1531 分。Ethan Mollick 批评：AI 评估 AI 在取自另一闭卷基准的公开问题上表现意义有限，且人类 ELO 设定方式不透明，认为更新前后均非良好基准。
